comment: This is generated by ESQL's FieldExtractFlattenedTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: field_extract_flattened
description: Extracts sub-fields from a flattened field, grouped into multiple flattened objects.
examples:
FROM cross_cluster_failures
| EVAL result = FIELD_EXTRACT_FLATTENED(flattened, "_clusters.details")
| MV_EXPAND result
| WHERE FIELD_EXTRACT(result, "status") == "successful"
| STATS count = COUNT() BY result
| KEEP result, count
